9eddf92e1856.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
9eddf92e1856.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
9eddf92e1856.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

ce7aca922400.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
ce7aca922400.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

67078ac7d700.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
67078ac7d700.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
67078ac7d700.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

3c993b14ce45.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
3c993b14ce45.description: With 289 reviews at 4.6/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
